name: Critical Mission File Repair
description: You are a UAV Maintenance Technician. A colleague uploaded a mission file to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/incoming_mission.plan for tomorrow's mapping survey, but a post-upload integrity check flagged CRITICAL ERRORS. The aircraft is grounded until you repair the file. Update the mission so that all waypoints use the standard survey altitude of 50 m and include a Return to Launch (RTL) command at the end of the sequence. Save the corrected file as /home/ga/Documents/QGC/fixed_mission.plan.
